title: chrysothamnus parryi subsp. attenuatus
intro: Chrysothamnus parryi subsp. attenuatus, also known as Wyoming big sagebrush, is a shrubby plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Chrysothamnus parryi subsp. attenuatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including wounds, coughs, and skin issues.
